# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The location in which to deploy the resources."
      }
    },
    "appServiceName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "my-web-app",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the App Service instance"
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "my-sql-server",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the SQL Server instance"
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "my-database",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the database to create"
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "my-storage-account",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account to create"
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[parameters('appServiceName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "tier": "Free",
        "size": "F1",
        "capacity": 0
      },
      "properties": {
        "name": "[parameters('appServiceName')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "tier": "GeneralPurpose",
        "family": "Gen5",
        "capacity": 2
      },
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "sqladminuser",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('password')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "tier": "GeneralPurpose",
        "family": "Gen5",
        "capacity": 2
      },
      "properties": {
        "collations": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2019-08-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "tier": "Standard",
        "kind": "StorageV2",
        "replicationType": "LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot"
      }
    }
  ]
}
